beIN SPORTS.desc_ar: Dive into the excitement of French handball with Liqui Moly Starligue, formerly LNH Division 1. Established in 1952, this premier league event features 16 top teams battling for glory. With Montpellier’s  14 Handball titles and Paris Saint-Germain's 11 wins, the competition is fierce. Champions earn spots in the EHF Champions League, while cup winners qualify for the European League.

beIN SPORTS XTRA 1.desc_ar: An ATP 250 clay-court tournament held in Bucharest, Romania, played on outdoor red clay. Part of the European clay swing leading into Roland Garros, it features a 28-player singles draw and 16-team doubles. The event rewards strong baseline play, endurance, and tactical construction, with valuable ATP ranking points and a title at stake.

beIN SPORTS 4.title_en: Brest vs Rennes - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 28
beIN SPORTS 4.title_fr: Brest vs Rennes - Ligue 1 française 2025/2026 28ème journée
beIN SPORTS 4.desc_ar: Brest have not won any of their last eight home games against Rennes in Ligue 1, since a 2-0 victory on 9 April 2011. Stade Brestois 29 have only had a longer winless run at home in the top-flight against Paris SG. Having lost 0-2 at Monaco and 0-3 at Auxerre, Brest could record three consecutive defeats without scoring in Ligue 1 for the first time in a single season since April 2013.

beIN SPORTS 4.title_en: Paris Saint-Germain vs Toulouse - French Ligue 1 2025/2026 Week 28
beIN SPORTS 4.title_fr: Paris Saint-Germain vs Toulouse - Ligue 1 française 2025/2026 28ème journée
beIN SPORTS 4.desc_ar: Paris Saint-Germain have kept 12 clean sheets against Toulouse in Ligue 1 during the QSI era, only doing better against Marseille. Paris Saint-Germain could record their 700th clean sheet in Ligue 1, becoming the eighth team to reach this tally in the history of the competition. Paris Saint-Germain also have the highest ratio of clean sheets in the top-flight.

beIN SPORTS 4.desc_ar: Metz have won their last three matches against Nantes, all in Ligue 1, and have never had a longer winning streak against them in 113 meetings in all competitions. Metz have not lost any of their last seven home games against Nantes in Ligue 1, their longest current unbeaten run at home against a top-flight team.
